tasks.subject: AW-281 Task 0: Design memo capture
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ensure founder-decision design memo is committed before implementation begins.

**Files:**
- Verify: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-17-aw-281-case-resolution-design.md
- Verify: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-15-nightcap-couch-race-design.md

**Verify:** `test -f docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-17-aw-281-case-resolution-design.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-17-aw-281-case-resolution-design.md"], "verifyCommand": "test -f docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-17-aw-281-case-resolution-design.md && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["design memo file present", "captures all four founder decisions"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: AW-281 Task 1: Couch Race arc JSON + registry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship nightcap/couch-race.arc.json (6 beats) and register in config/arcs.json.

**Verify:** `pytest engine/tests/test_couch_race_arc_json.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nightcap/couch-race.arc.json", "config/arcs.json", "engine/tests/test_couch_race_arc_json.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_couch_race_arc_json.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["arc validates as ArcDefinition", "six beats in order", "linear beat graph", "pacing weights sum to 1.0", "killer_assignment=false", "registry resolves the arc", "existing nightcap arc still resolves"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: AW-281 Task 2: engine/case/ module + arc-agnostic domain models
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create engine/case/ scaffold with ResolvedCase, CastMember, EvidenceEntry, AuthorizedFalsehood, CaseSkeleton, errors, README.

**Verify:** `pytest engine/tests/test_case_models.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine/case/__init__.py", "engine/case/models.py", "engine/case/errors.py", "engine/case/README.md", "engine/tests/test_case_models.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_case_models.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["public exports available", "extra='forbid' on every model", "no game-specific vocabulary in schema", "models round-trip via model_dump"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: AW-281 Task 3: Case skeletons + JSON schema
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three v1 authored case skeletons under nightcap/case_skeletons/.

**Verify:** `pytest engine/tests/test_case_skeleton_content.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nightcap/case_skeletons/locked_room_poisoning.json", "nightcap/case_skeletons/alibi_collapse.json", "nightcap/case_skeletons/pre_conspiracy_fall.json", "nightcap/case_skeletons/README.md", "engine/tests/test_case_skeleton_content.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_case_skeleton_content.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["three skeleton files present", "each validates against CaseSkeleton", "each has >=3 clue stages", "each covers >=3 suspect archetype-roles", "each reveal has >=4 steps"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: AW-281 Task 4: Taxonomy tables + loader
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Axes 5-6 generative content library + engine/case/loader.py.

**Verify:** `pytest engine/tests/test_case_loader.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nightcap/case_taxonomy/motive_families.json", "nightcap/case_taxonomy/method_families.json", "nightcap/case_taxonomy/evidence_types.json", "nightcap/case_taxonomy/lie_topics.json", "nightcap/case_taxonomy/README.md", "nightcap/case_resolution_config.json", "engine/case/loader.py", "engine/case/__init__.py", "engine/tests/test_case_loader.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_case_loader.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["taxonomy JSONs load", "load_skeletons returns dict of CaseSkeleton", "load_taxonomy populates 4 family lists", "config loader reads cast-size table", "missing paths raise CaseResolutionError"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: AW-281 Task 5: Case resolver + runtime invariant assertions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** engine/case/resolver.py deterministic, engine/case/invariants.py pure functions.

**Verify:** `pytest engine/tests/test_case_resolver.py engine/tests/test_case_invariants.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine/case/invariants.py", "engine/case/resolver.py", "engine/case/__init__.py", "engine/tests/test_case_resolver.py", "engine/tests/test_case_invariants.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_case_resolver.py engine/tests/test_case_invariants.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["resolve() returns ResolvedCase", "deterministic replay", "cast size scales with player count", "invariants raise CaseInvariantError on failure", "invariant checks are pure functions"], "modelTier": "high"}
```

tasks.subject: AW-281 Task 6: Property tests over 1000+ seeds
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 1000-seed sweep per skeleton in engine/tests/test_case_property_sweep.py.

**Verify:** `pytest engine/tests/test_case_property_sweep.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine/tests/test_case_property_sweep.py", "pyproject.toml"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_case_property_sweep.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3000 cases resolved without CaseInvariantError", "every case has genuine evidence", "exactly one culprit per case", "sweep completes <30s"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: AW-281 Task 7: Synthetic detective solver
tasks.description:
**Goal:** engine/case/solver.py bounded rational-actor solver, wins 300 seeds in CI.

**Verify:** `pytest engine/tests/test_case_solver.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine/case/solver.py", "engine/case/__init__.py", "engine/tests/test_case_solver.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_case_solver.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["synthetic_detective returns SolverVerdict", "solver wins on 300 seeds Ã— 3 skeletons", "solver uses only ResolvedCase input", "solver's culprit_id matches case's culprit_id"], "modelTier": "high"}
```

tasks.subject: AW-281 Task 8: Harness runner integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend engine/harness/runner.py to branch on play_mode; harness completes 6-beat run at counts 2 and 8.

**Verify:** `pytest engine/tests/test_couch_race_harness.py engine/tests/test_harness_runner.py engine/tests/test_aw256_beat_hardcode.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine/harness/runner.py", "engine/tests/test_couch_race_harness.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_couch_race_harness.py engine/tests/test_harness_runner.py engine/tests/test_aw256_beat_hardcode.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["6-beat run completes at counts 2 and 8", "resolved_generative_elements carries case summary", "deterministic replay across runners", "Imposter Variant harness still green", "AW-256 hardcoded-beat test still green"], "modelTier": "high"}
```
